name: Anton & Giovanni’s Adventures in Sicily
overview: Anton du Beke and Giovanni Pernice turning their backs on ballroom for a while to explore the sun-kissed island of Sicily. Checking out everything from the famous volcano of Mount Etna to tiny old towns off the beaten track. The lucky pair will also sample Sicily’s delicious cuisine and indulge in the odd tango or two.

trailers.title: Anton and Giovanni's Adventures in Sicily | Trailer - BBC
